title: IRCC offices in Canada: By appointment only - Canada.ca
content:
## IRCC offices in Canada: By appointment only
Only clients with scheduled appointments can visit an office.
Learn about rescheduling your
- citizenship ceremony
- Contact the office that sent you the invitation.
- The contact information is in the letter we sent.
Email or mail us the paperwork at the address we gave you in the request letter we sent you.
Contact us using the web form .
Learn about refugee protection in Canada .
- Manitoba and Nunavut |
- Newfoundland and Labrador |
- Northwest Territories |
- Prince Edward Island |
